project_info.name: Dashboard Barber
project_info.description: SaaS B2B mobile-first PWA dashboard for barbershops with POS features.

primary.description: White label feature: Primary color can be overridden per salon. Defaults to high-contrast black/white.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid for dashboards, Generous mobile padding for client flows.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
spacing_and_layout.bento_styles: Use strict grid geometry. Cards should have max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg) with 1px border. No soft shadows. Flat solid surfaces.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:opacity-90 font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-transform active:scale-95

cards.default: bg-white dark:bg-[#111111] border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6

inputs.style: Shadcn default but with square or mildly rounded corners (rounded-md). High contrast focus ring: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black dark:focus:ring-white

client_flow.description: 8-step wizard using mobile-first screens. Use a sticky bottom bar for 'Next/Pay' actions. Big tap targets.

barber_view.description: Massive toggle for availability. 'Next Client' card taking up 60% of the viewport height. High visual priority.

manager_dashboard.description: Grid of SVG chairs. The chairs must be colored by status scale (Blue: 1-2, Yellow: 3-5, Red: 6+). Feature gates locked with a padlock icon.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp opacity changes or subtle 1px border highlights. No muddy shadows.
motion_and_interactions.page_loads: Fade in bottom-up stagger for dashboard widgets using Framer Motion.

assets_and_media.icons: lucide-react for UI. Custom simple SVGs for hair textures and barber chairs.

images.description: Modern barbershop interior for landing page or auth background.
Minimalist brand logo placeholder for white-label previews.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, inputs, and state toggles. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='barber-status-toggle'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the SVG Barber Chairs. Draw a simple stylized chair path and fill it using the status colors provided (blue, yellow, red, gray).
Build the Client 8-step flow as a responsive PWA layout with a bottom navigation/action bar.
For the Manager Dashboard, implement a dense 'Control Room' bento grid.
Ensure 'Inter' is loaded via Google Fonts or next/font and applied globally in tailwind config.
Use generic React Context or Zustand for the white-label theme provider so the primary color can be injected via CSS variables.
All components should be in .js/.jsx, not TypeScript.
Apply data-testid to every interactive element.
